title: Luffy Returns From the Mirror World
description: On pages 6–9, this part focuses on Unknown person #5, Unknown person #6, Unknown person #7, Unknown person #8, Luffy, Sanji as The Straw Hats break through Big Mom’s encirclement as allies buy time and Luffy’s fight reaches its conclusion.
scene: Luffy escapes the mirror world while Jinbe, Germa, and the Sun Pirates help the crew break through Big Mom’s forces.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Mama is at Puffs Island right now.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: lady chiffon, the minister of puffs, is in charge of that island....!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Why did you bring the cake to this town!!!?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: This town is going to be destroyed!! Ruuunnnnnnnnnnnnnnnnnnnnnnnnnnnnnnnnnnnnnnnnnnnnnnnnnnnnn

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We'll be destroyed by Mama, just like nuts Island was!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Lady Chiffon has been corrupted by that traitor, Bege!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Huff...huff... it's because... I believe... in that cake!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I don't know where he learned to cook, but...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Black leg's culinary abili- ties... surpass even those of the head chef...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Let's escape, Chiffon!! Whether this country is saved or not doesn't matter to us!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: The NOSTRA Castello has been destroyed already!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: If they die after all we've done.... I'll never forgive them!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You guys... I got tired of waiting for you guys....!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Chopper-san, please attend to him immediately!! This is already the limit of how much blood he can lose!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Let me take a look at you too, Sanji. You were shot!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Good, we're finally able to hit them.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Before we were able to notice, they caught up with us!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We're not out of this yet!! Do the treatment while we make our getaway!!

summary: This section advances the Whole Cake Island Finale storyline with 45 dialogue beats. The crew escapes Totto Land through the sacrifices and timing of Jinbe, Germa, and the Sun Pirates.
